message:
fix(dep): use errors.Is for sql.ErrNoRows check, update metadata on re-add

Addresses review feedback on PR #1999: the existing type-mismatch guard
for dep add used bare != comparison instead of errors.Is() for
sql.ErrNoRows, which could mask real database errors as "no row found".
Also fixes the idempotent re-add path (same type) to update metadata
rather than silently dropping it — preserving the useful part of the
old ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE behavior. Both fixes applied to
dependencies.go and wisps.go for consistency.

Closes #1999

Co-Authored-By: Joseph Turian <turian@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
